name: acquiring a technology's own canonical source whole reaches the operator's minimum rule floor (sufficiency ok)
command: ID=P562S01; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache fc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; grep -qE 'rule_count=(3[0-9]|[4-9][0-9]|[0-9]{3,}) sufficiency=ok' e.err && echo canonical-meets-floor 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p fc && for i in $(seq 1 32); do echo "Vue guideline $i: prefer keyed lists and composition."; done > fc/vuejs-style-guide.txt
